project_name: Data Pipeline Automation & System Monitoring Dashboard

rules: No full-screen gradients. Color is for function only.
Use Signal Red for failures and Klein Blue for active running states.
Never use pure black or pure grey. Tint darks slightly with blue (#0A0A0A -> #0F172A if softening).
Do not use Inter, Roboto, or generic sans for headings.
Use IBM Plex Mono for cron syntax, log streams, SQL queries, and IDs.
Uppercase labels must have generous letter spacing (tracking-widest).

layout_and_spacing.spacing_scale: Dense. Use p-4 and p-6. gap-4 between widgets.
rules: Use 'Grid Borders' approach: widgets sit in a border-collapse grid to expose the skeleton.
No rounded corners on major layout blocks. Max 4px (rounded-sm) on small inputs/buttons.
Optical alignment: ensure data metrics align perfectly on the left axis.

components.cards: Flat background (bg-white), 1px subtle border (border-border), no shadow. Square edges.
components.buttons: Sharp corners. High contrast. Primary buttons are #0A0A0A or #002FA7.
components.tables: Dense. border-b only for rows. No vertical lines. Mono font for data cells.
components.inputs: Shadcn UI forms. Square borders. focus:ring-2 focus:ring-blue-600 focus:ring-offset-0.
components.logs_viewer: Neo-brutalist terminal. Dark background (#0A0A0A), mono font, green/red/yellow text for severities.
components.badges: Square, pure color background, white text. No soft pastel badges. Raw contrast.
components.charts: Recharts. Use sharp lines (linear, not monotone). No area fills, just precise line graphs.

rules: Hover: subtle background color shift (e.g., bg-zinc-50 to bg-zinc-100).
No bouncy spring animations. Use ease-out 150ms.

icons.style: Regular or Bold weight. No duotone in dashboards.

image_urls.description: Abstract geometric shape for the SaaS brand logo

media.rules: Never use placeholders. Use these exact URLs.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: APCA standard. Ensure dark text on light backgrounds.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (kebab-case, role-based).

instructions_to_main_agent: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for structural layout (grid).
Use Shadcn UI for complex interactives (Tables, Dialogs, Select), but customize them to be sharp, square, and cardless.
For the Live Logs viewer, use a dark-themed div with monospace font and custom scrollbar.
Charts must be rendered using Recharts, formatted strictly with the specified color palette.
Ensure the layout mimics a high-density 'Control Room' – prioritize data over whitespace.
